plot outline: An ex-cop-turned-con threatens to jump to his death from a Manhattan hotel. The nearest New York Police Officer immediately responds to a screaming woman and calls dispatch. More officers arrive with SWAT and tactical command along with firefighters. The police then dispatch a police psychologist personally requested to talk him down from the ledge. However, things aren't as they seem.
title: Man on a Ledge
akas: L'home de la cornisa (Spain, Catalan title)
窗台上的男人 (China, Mandarin title)

other companies.name: International Alliance of Theatrical Stage Employees (IATSE)
